params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 di?
params.context: ★★ perplexity V7-E envelope (HPACK fix). Per #762 verdict: ERR_HTTP2_COMPRESSION_ERROR on multiple analytics endpoints — distinct from end_stream issue. Root cause: 'Connection: keep-alive' header in V7-D envelope is FORBIDDEN in HTTP/2 per RFC 7540 §8.1.2.2 (connection-specific headers). When engine converts H1→H2 without stripping, browser HPACK decoder rejects HEADERS frame → ERR_HTTP2_COMPRESSION_ERROR cascades. DB UPDATE: removed 'Connection: keep-alive' line from envelope_template. New length: 1195 bytes (was 1218). reload_templates SUCCESS. Other H2-allowed headers preserved (Content-Type, Cache-Control, X-Accel-Buffering, CORS). Combined with prior h2_end_stream=1 fix should fully unblock SPA rendering. Expected: V7-D fields + correct HEADERS frame → React answer-block component mounts → Korean warning rendered.

notes: perplexity V7-E HPACK fix — removed forbidden 'Connection: keep-alive' header. RFC 7540 §8.1.2.2 forbids Connection/Transfer-Encoding/Keep-Alive/etc in HTTP/2. Engine H1→H2 conversion may not strip these. Direct fix at envelope_template source.
